Compliance.description: PPRA registered; Fidelity Fund Certificate; SETA NQF compliance for agents; no violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Google 4.8/5 (33 reviews); high praise for agent professionalism and transparency. Limited HelloPeter data.

Product Value.description: Full spectrum property services; tech-empowered agents; good value but lacks pricing transparency online.

Innovation.description: Agent tech platform (listings, deal mgmt, comms); Compass partnership; AI referral tools; digital marketing.

Customer Support.description: Agent-direct service praised; no centralized helpdesk found; limited formal support structure.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website accessible; POPIA-compliant assumed; no app or advanced security features found. Compass integration implies data security.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Standard SA commissions 5-7.5%+VAT; management fees quoted per property

socialSentiment.summary: Google highly positive; limited social data; professional reputation noted.
